normalization_scope: Live retained artifact layer only; historical reports in docs/ and backup snapshots under .repo_cleanup_backup/ were intentionally left untouched.

authority_hierarchy.source: retained frozen Phase I artifacts explicitly aligned to the final paper
authority_hierarchy.usage: Primary authority for overlapping retained quantities.
Cross-check only; never used to override retained artifacts.
Used to repair or narrow contradictory retained metadata and scope claims.

authority_hierarchy.source: implementation-level metric definitions in src/ and notebook scripts
authority_hierarchy.usage: Used to resolve scope and derivation semantics when retained artifacts overlap.
Used only when stronger retained or config evidence is unavailable.

manifest.json.role: Live experiment index for retained result artifacts.

ARTIFACT_MANIFEST.md.role: Human-readable authority guide for the live retained layer.

ARTIFACT_NOTES.md.role: Mixed-provenance notes, caveats, and unresolved ambiguities.

phase1_consolidated.json.role: Frozen class-level Phase I summary with stored thresholds, class means, class-level classification, and the copied safety envelope.
phase1_consolidated.json.provenance_note: Normalization repaired only the same-file sufficient-data metadata contradiction.

phase1_stats.json.role: Inferential rerun used to persist per-trajectory entanglement values, the permutation test, and bootstrap confidence interval.
canonical_for: per-trajectory entanglement arrays from the per-trajectory-QBM rerun
phase1_stats.json.provenance_note: delta_observed belongs to the later per-trajectory-QBM rerun and remains explicitly noncanonical for the frozen headline delta.

phase1_entanglement_distributions.json.role: Shared-QBM reproduced distribution artifact with per-trajectory s_ent and pri arrays across the six retained agent classes.
canonical_for: per-trajectory s_ent arrays in the shared-QBM rerun
per-trajectory pri arrays in the shared-QBM rerun
derived descriptive AUC support for Type A vs Type B
phase1_entanglement_distributions.json.provenance_note: delta_validated is only the notebook tolerance check; the file is support-only for distributional evidence.

adversarial_controls.json.role: Diagnostic adversarial-control artifact combining notebook-07 false-positive and gamma-sweep outputs with a copied Phase I safety envelope summary.
adversarial_controls.json.provenance_note: Safety-envelope fields remain copied from phase1_consolidated.json; only the diagnostic outputs are canonical here.

temporal_persistence.json.role: Default-config temporal persistence summaries and window-size EPS sweep.
not_canonical_for: frozen Phase I class-level EPS means
frozen Phase I class-level PRI means
temporal_persistence.json.provenance_note: Apparent EPS and PRI overlaps with phase1_consolidated.json are non-comparable because notebook 04 uses configs/default.yaml rather than the frozen Phase I setting.

counterfactual.json.role: Counterfactual divergence and anticipatory restructuring diagnostics.
counterfactual.json.provenance_note: This file is diagnostic-only in the current release.

cross_agent.json.role: Cross-agent inference and CLMP/ECI diagnostic artifact.
cross_agent.json.provenance_note: No overlapping retained file competes with this artifact for its metric family.

core_baselines_phase1.json.role: Matched Phase I RBM and Autoencoder rerun with accuracy, AUC, FPR, and threshold metrics.
core_baselines_phase1.json.provenance_note: Notebook 18 hardcodes latent dimension 16 for the classical models, so this file is not interchangeable with baseline_comparisons.json.

baseline_comparisons.json.role: Dedicated five-model baseline-comparison study under configs/baselines.yaml.
canonical_for: QBM versus classical baseline comparison family
five-model baseline deltas on the dedicated comparison dataset
not_canonical_for: matched Phase I RBM and Autoencoder metrics
baseline_comparisons.json.provenance_note: Normalization repaired only the broken absolute config path and annotated the scope distinction from core_baselines_phase1.json.

hidden_dim_sweep.json.provenance_note: Normalization repaired only the broken absolute config path.

scalability_grid.json.provenance_note: No overlapping retained file competes with this artifact for its sweep outputs.

alpha_sweep.json.role: Continuation-weight interpolation sweep within the synthetic family.
alpha_sweep.json.provenance_note: This file is the sole retained source for the continuation-weight sweep family.

non_gridworld.json.role: Non-gridworld transfer-failure artifact for the 1d corridor domain.
non_gridworld.json.provenance_note: Normalization repaired only the broken absolute config path.

transformer_validation.json.role: Minimal bounded transformer validation retained as an exploratory check.
transformer_validation.json.provenance_note: This file is exploratory and explicitly outside the frozen Phase I authority layer.

phase1_frozen_headline_summary.scope: Frozen headline Phase I delta, thresholds, and class-level gate summary.
phase1_frozen_headline_summary.resolution_note: Whenever a retained file disagrees on an overlapping Phase I headline quantity, use phase1_consolidated.json.

phase1_safety_envelope.scope: Seven-condition safety envelope and summary counts copied into the adversarial artifact.
phase1_safety_envelope.resolution_note: adversarial_controls.json retains the copied envelope for convenience, but phase1_consolidated.json remains the source of truth.

phase1_inferential_support.scope: Permutation-test p-value, bootstrap confidence interval, and per-trajectory entanglement arrays from the per-trajectory-QBM rerun.
phase1_inferential_support.resolution_note: Use this file for inferential support only; do not promote its delta_observed to the frozen headline delta.

phase1_distribution_auc_support.scope: Per-trajectory s_ent and pri arrays from the shared-QBM rerun plus descriptive AUC support derived from the retained arrays.
phase1_distribution_auc_support.resolution_note: This file supports descriptive distribution and AUC claims; it is not the authority for the frozen headline delta or frozen class means.

adversarial_diagnostics.scope: Mimicry false-positive sweep, high-entropy false-positive rate, and gamma sweep.
adversarial_diagnostics.resolution_note: Use adversarial_controls.json for the diagnostic outputs only; its copied safety envelope remains noncanonical for that family.

temporal_persistence.scope: Temporal persistence summaries and window-size EPS sweep under the default configuration.
temporal_persistence.resolution_note: EPS and PRI names overlap with the frozen summary, but the retained quantities are not directly comparable because the temporal file uses a different config and batch protocol.

counterfactual_diagnostics.scope: Counterfactual divergence and anticipatory restructuring diagnostics.
counterfactual_diagnostics.resolution_note: No competing retained artifact overlaps with this metric family.

cross_agent_inference.scope: CLMP summaries, ECI correlation, and pair-level cross-agent inference records.
cross_agent_inference.resolution_note: No competing retained artifact overlaps with this metric family.

matched_phase1_classical_baselines.scope: Matched Phase I RBM and Autoencoder accuracy, AUC, FPR, thresholds, and deltas.
matched_phase1_classical_baselines.resolution_note: Use this file for matched Phase I baseline quantities only.

dedicated_baseline_comparison.scope: Dedicated five-model QBM versus classical baseline comparison family.
dedicated_baseline_comparison.resolution_note: Use this file for the dedicated baseline-comparison section and not for matched Phase I RBM or Autoencoder claims.

hidden_dim_sweep.scope: Exploratory hidden-dimension sweep and mean-field collapse boundary.
hidden_dim_sweep.resolution_note: This file is the sole retained source for the hidden-dimension sweep.

grid_and_nonmarkov_scalability.resolution_note: This file is the sole retained source for the grid and non-Markovian scalability family.

alpha_sweep.scope: Continuation-weight interpolation sweep and correlation summary.
alpha_sweep.resolution_note: This file is the sole retained source for the alpha sweep family.

non_gridworld_transfer.scope: Transfer-failure result in the non-gridworld corridor domain.
non_gridworld_transfer.resolution_note: This file is the sole retained source for the non-gridworld transfer family.

transformer_exploratory_validation.scope: Minimal bounded transformer validation retained as an exploratory check.
transformer_exploratory_validation.resolution_note: This file is exploratory and should not be promoted into the frozen Phase I authority layer.

contradictions.nature_of_inconsistency: Same-file self-contradiction between numeric metadata and copied summary text.
contradictions.likely_cause: Stale copied safety-envelope detail string from a pre-locked dataset size.
contradictions.resolution: Repaired the detail string to N=30 per class, T=100 and preserved all numeric results.

contradictions.nature_of_inconsistency: Copied safety-envelope text disagreed with the locked Phase I size.
contradictions.likely_cause: adversarial_controls.json retained a copied stale detail string from the canonical summary.
contradictions.resolution: Repaired the copied detail string and documented that the safety envelope remains sourced from phase1_consolidated.json.

contradictions.nature_of_inconsistency: Same named quantity with materially different values (0.3810883045604201 versus 0.5770331774604861).
contradictions.likely_cause: phase1_stats.json is a later per-trajectory-QBM inferential rerun rather than the frozen shared-summary artifact.
contradictions.resolution: Marked phase1_consolidated.json canonical for the headline delta and phase1_stats.json canonical only for inferential support.

contradictions.nature_of_inconsistency: Same named quantity with materially different values (0.3810883045604201 versus 0.21345742336630646).
contradictions.likely_cause: phase1_entanglement_distributions.json is a reproduced shared-QBM distribution run that does not exactly recreate the frozen headline summary.
contradictions.resolution: Narrowed phase1_entanglement_distributions.json to array and AUC-support authority only and left the frozen headline delta with phase1_consolidated.json.

contradictions.nature_of_inconsistency: Shared metric names but different retained values for the same classes.
contradictions.likely_cause: Notebook 04 uses configs/default.yaml and a different batch-analysis protocol, while the frozen summary records retained Phase I gate-level values.
contradictions.resolution: Marked the temporal artifact canonical only for the temporal-persistence family and documented the overlap as non-comparable rather than unresolved.

contradictions.nature_of_inconsistency: Overlapping model names with different retained deltas for RBM and Autoencoder.
contradictions.likely_cause: The files represent different baseline families: a matched Phase I rerun versus a dedicated five-model comparison dataset, with different classical model settings.
contradictions.resolution: Separated the two baseline families in the authority map and documented partial canonicality by metric family.
